title: Meta Media Buying Professional
subtitle: Examen 410-101 · 60 preg · 105 min
description: Certificación oficial de Meta para media buyers. Cubre Ads Manager, Business Suite, objectives, buying types, signals, audiencias, creativos y medición.

units.title: Día 1 — Ads Manager + Business Suite
units.subtitle: Jerarquía, Advantage+, BP, portfolios, billing, brand safety

units.title: Día 2 — Campaign Objectives
units.subtitle: Los 6 ODAX, optimization events, signal optimization

units.title: Día 3 — Buying Types & Bid Strategies
units.subtitle: Auction vs Reservation, bid strategies, Learning Phase

units.title: Día 4 — Signals & Data
units.subtitle: Pixel + CAPI, eventos, AEM y iOS 14+

units.title: Día 5 — Audiences & Catalogs
units.subtitle: Custom audiences, Lookalike, Advantage+ Audience, Catalog Ads

units.title: Día 6 — Creative & Measurement
units.subtitle: Formatos, A/B Test, Brand Lift, Conversion Lift, attribution
